name: Hip Hop Squares
overview: Hip Hop Squares is an American television game show hosted by New York radio personality Peter Rosenberg, which debuted on MTV2 on May 22, 2012. The show's format is similar to Hollywood Squares, but with a more "urban" theme. The show is taped in Brooklyn, New York.

trailers.title: Hip Hop Squares | Season 1 Official Super Trailer | Premieres Monday March 13th 9/8C | VH1
